name: Strawberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2 to 3 quart saucepan, stir together 1/2 cup sugar, 1-1/2 tbsp cornstarch, 1 cup orange juice and Grand Marnier liqueur until smooth.
2. Bring mixture to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring constantly until it becomes clear and thickened.
3. Stir in the sliced hulled strawberries until well combined.
4. Let the sauce cool before serving over vanilla ice cream.
